column.text:
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list with back spasms.
• Athletics transferred RHP Luis Severino to the 60-day injured list with a right shoulder strain.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Miami Marlins designated first baseman Christopher Morel for assignment.
• Minnesota Twins designated RHP Justin Lawrence for assignment.
• New York Mets sent SS Francisco Lindor on a rehab assignment to the Syracuse Mets.
• Texas Rangers sent LHP Jordan Montgomery on a rehab assignment to the Frisco RoughRiders.
• Texas Rangers placed RHP Jack Leiter on the 15-day injured list with a right ankle impingement.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
